title: Apex trigger: bulkification & governor limits
rubric: Identifies SOQL-inside-loop as a governor-limit failure (100 queries/transaction)
Identifies DML-inside-loop as a governor-limit failure (150 DML statements/transaction)
Identifies the lost-update bug when multiple opps share the same AccountId
Corrected code queries accounts once (IN :set), accumulates in a Map, and does a single update
